expectations.text: Treats the prior PRD draft discussion as authoritative input context rather than restarting from zero
expectations.evidence: It says '还差几项会直接影响实现和客服处理的规则' and asks follow-up questions tied to the prior subscription discussion, so it does continue from prior context.

expectations.text: Performs a gap review covering confirmed rules plus any remaining boundary, risk, or missing-decision items
expectations.evidence: It lists additional open questions, but it does not review what is already confirmed, so it is not a full gap review.

expectations.text: Makes a readiness judgment and explicitly asks for permission before generating the final downstream prompt
expectations.evidence: It offers to '按一套默认方案先补进去，再继续往下整理成完整 PRD' instead of explicitly asking for permission before final generation.

eval_feedback.overall: This eval clearly exposes the missing late-stage behavior. Baseline continues interrogating or defaulting instead of pausing for review and authorization.
